commands.review_summary:
The PR makes isolated cron execution rebuild a missing sourceDelivery plan through a shared cron source-delivery planner and adds regression coverage for stale caller shapes.

PR surface: Source +40, Tests +492. Total +532 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main dereferences params.sourceDelivery.sourceReplyDeliveryMode before a guard, and the PR body includes terminal before/after output for an omitted-sourceDelivery executor call. I did not run that harness locally because this review is read-only.
